summary: Superb soundboard capture of an incendiary New York jam featuring a soaring Dark Star/Spanish Jam/Lovelight sequence.
review: The patched soundboard version delivers crystal‑clear audio that lets listeners soak in one of the most celebrated guest‑filled performances ever – a blistering Dark Star into Spanish Jam and Lovelight with Duane Allman, Peter Green and Gregg Allman all joining. Reviewers rave about the cosmic intensity and flawless mix, noting only a few personal taste objections to Garcia’s single‑coil tone shift.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently high 4‑5 star reviews praise both the musical performance (standout Dark Star/Spanish Jam/Lovelight) and the superb soundboard quality; only a single low‑star comment about guitar tone slightly lowers the average.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, balanced mix with superb clarity; patched to fill missing segments but no audible drop‑outs. Minor comment that Peter Green’s guitar is faint, yet overall sound is praised as superb.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert flows as a free‑form, star‑studded jam session; guests weave in and out creating a coherent yet wild musical narrative that builds to an epic Dark Star/Spanish Jam/Lovelight climax.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Garcia’s shift toward single‑coil guitars is noted (some listeners miss the early tone), but his lead work during the marathon jams is widely praised.
band_member_comments.Phil: Phil steps back on Lovelight as Berry Oakley takes over bass, highlighting a relaxed moment for Phil during the jam.
band_member_comments.Bob: Bob Weir joins in the post‑show embrace; no specific performance remarks were made.
band_member_comments.Keys: Gregg Allman slides onto the organ bench for Spanish Jam and trades vocals with Pigpen, adding a powerful keyboard presence.
band_member_comments.Drums: Butch, Mickey (with his massive gong), and guest drummers Mick Fleetwood & Danny Kirwan layer an expansive percussion wall throughout the set.
